gps_init.message0: Init GPS module %1 serial %2 baud rate %3
gps_init.tooltip: Initialize TinyGPS++ module, select serial port and baud rate for GPS

gps_update.tooltip: Read and parse GPS data from serial, call in loop repeatedly

gps_location.tooltip: Get GPS latitude or longitude value

gps_date.tooltip: Get GPS date year, month or day

gps_time.tooltip: Get GPS time hour, minute or second

gps_satellites.tooltip: Get the number of connected satellites

gps_hdop.tooltip: Get HDOP (Horizontal Dilution of Precision), lower is more accurate

gps_is_valid.tooltip: Check if GPS data is valid

gps_distance_between.message0:
Distance between two points (m)
Lat1 %1 Lng1 %2
Lat2 %3 Lng2 %4
gps_distance_between.tooltip: Calculate distance between two GPS coordinates in meters

gps_course_to.message0:
Course between two points
Lat1 %1 Lng1 %2
Lat2 %3 Lng2 %4
gps_course_to.tooltip: Calculate course angle from first GPS coordinate to second
